notes: Zhang 2026 review (PMC13149593): Antarctic research station HZ rate 33.3/1000/PY. Synthetic obs (2 events / 60 person-years) anchors exactly at published rate. Population: isolated winter-over researchers under psychosocial stress — most directly analogous to analog-astronaut cohort.

Goodenow-Messman 2022 (PMC8799707): 7 post-flight CaOx symptomatic renal stones in 358 post-flight astronaut person-years (Sibonga dataset). Post-flight rate 19.6/1000/PY. Conservative for analog missions (no microgravity calciuria); posterior expected ~10/1000/PY as principled upper bound.
